title: 2025-09-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 10.05
description: New daily signal for 2025-09-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 10.05/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-09-26, the score printed 10.05/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
